services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Azure Functions is an event-driven, serverless compute platform that helps you develop more efficiently using the programming language of your choice.
services.pricing: Pay per execution, execution time and memory

news.title: Foundry IQ: Build smarter agents faster with unified knowledge and serverless retrieval

services.name: Azure Container Apps
services.description: Azure Container Apps is a fully managed serverless container service for building and deploying modern apps at scale.
services.pricing: Pay per vCPU and memory per second

pricingDetails.label: Standard NC A100 v4 GPU Usage
Standard NC T4 v3 GPU Usage

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Azure Cosmos DB is a fully managed, globally distributed, multi-model NoSQL database service for building highly responsive and scalable applications.
services.pricing: Pay per RU/s provisioned or consumed (serverless)

services.name: Azure Service Bus
services.description: Azure Service Bus is a fully managed enterprise message broker with message queues and publish-subscribe topics for decoupling applications.
services.pricing: Pay per million operations and brokered connections

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Azure Event Grid is a fully managed event routing service that enables uniform event consumption using a publish-subscribe model.
services.pricing: Pay per million operations

services.name: Azure Event Hubs
services.description: Azure Event Hubs is a big data streaming platform and event ingestion service capable of receiving and processing millions of events per second.
services.pricing: Pay per throughput unit and ingress events

services.name: Azure Logic Apps
services.description: Azure Logic Apps is a cloud platform for creating and running automated workflows that integrate your apps, data, services, and systems.
services.pricing: Pay per action execution and connector usage

limits.name: Max workflows per subscription per region

services.name: Azure API Management
services.description: Azure API Management is a hybrid, multi-cloud management platform for APIs across all environments, enabling secure and productive API programs.
services.pricing: Pay per unit (Consumption: per 10K calls)

services.name: Azure Blob Storage
services.description: Azure Blob Storage is a massively scalable and secure object storage for cloud-native workloads, archives, data lakes, and high-performance computing.
services.pricing: Pay per GB stored and operations

limits.name: Max request rate per storage account

services.name: Azure Queue Storage
services.description: Azure Queue Storage is a service for storing large numbers of messages that can be accessed from anywhere via authenticated HTTP or HTTPS calls.
services.pricing: Pay per 10K operations and storage

services.name: Azure SignalR Service
services.description: Azure SignalR Service is a fully managed service for adding real-time web functionality to applications, enabling server-to-client push content instantly.
services.pricing: Pay per unit and messages (serverless mode)

limits.name: Max messages per unit per day (Free)

services.name: Azure Static Web Apps
services.description: Azure Static Web Apps is a service that automatically builds and deploys full-stack web apps from a code repository to Azure.
services.pricing: Free tier available; Standard plan per app/month

limits.name: Max API functions
limits.value: Managed Functions or bring your own

services.name: Azure Kubernetes Service
services.description: Azure Kubernetes Service is a managed Kubernetes service for deploying, managing, and scaling containerized applications with integrated CI/CD and enterprise-grade security.
services.pricing: Free control plane + compute costs (Standard tier: $0.10/cluster/hour)

news.title: Powering multi-cluster workloads with seamless cross‑cluster networking for Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager

services.name: Azure SQL Serverless
services.description: Azure SQL Database serverless is a compute tier that automatically scales compute based on workload demand and bills for compute used per second.
services.pricing: Pay per vCore-second + storage

services.name: Azure AI Services
services.description: Azure AI Services provides pre-built and customizable AI models and APIs for vision, speech, language, and decision-making capabilities.
services.pricing: Pay per transaction or token

services.name: Azure Key Vault
services.description: Azure Key Vault is a cloud service for securely storing and accessing secrets, keys, and certificates.
services.pricing: Pay per operation and key/secret stored

limits.name: Max vaults per subscription per region

services.name: Azure Notification Hubs
services.description: Azure Notification Hubs is a massively scalable push notification engine for quickly sending millions of notifications to iOS, Android, Windows, or any backend.
services.pricing: Pay per namespace tier + pushes

services.name: Azure Durable Functions
services.description: Azure Durable Functions is an extension of Azure Functions that lets you write stateful functions in a serverless compute environment with support for long-running orchestrations.
services.pricing: Same as Azure Functions (pay per execution)

services.name: Azure Stream Analytics
services.description: Azure Stream Analytics is a fully managed, real-time analytics service designed to process fast-moving streams of data with a simple SQL-based query language.
services.pricing: Pay per streaming unit per hour

services.name: Azure Data Factory
services.description: Azure Data Factory is a serverless data integration service for creating, scheduling, and orchestrating ETL/ELT workflows at scale.
services.pricing: Pay per activity run, pipeline orchestration, and data movement

services.name: Azure Synapse Serverless SQL
services.description: Azure Synapse Serverless SQL pool lets you query data in your data lake using T-SQL without provisioning dedicated resources.
services.pricing: Pay per TB of data processed ($5/TB)

services.name: Azure Communication Services
services.description: Azure Communication Services provides rich communication APIs for SMS, email, voice, video, and chat to build engaging customer experiences.
services.pricing: Pay per message, minute, or participant

services.name: Azure Web PubSub
services.description: Azure Web PubSub is a fully managed service for building real-time web applications using WebSockets and the publish-subscribe pattern.
services.pricing: Pay per unit and messages

limits.name: Max messages per second per unit

services.name: Azure CDN
services.description: Azure CDN is a global content delivery network for delivering high-bandwidth content with low latency from edge servers closest to users.
services.pricing: Pay per GB transferred and requests
